name: Chocolate Chip-Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter or regular margarine and set aside.
2. Sprinkle the chocolate chips over the bottom of an 8-inch unbaked pie shell.
3. Freeze for at least 1 hour.
4. In a bowl, combine the eggs, corn syrup, sugar, melted butter, and salt.
5. Beat until well blended using an electric mixer on medium speed.
6. Stir in the pecans.
7. Pour over the chocolate chips in the pie shell.
8. Bake in a 375 degree F oven for 50 minutes or until the custard is set.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
